title: Yasuie’s Execution Shakes Wano
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Orochi, Unknown person #7, Yasuie, Unknown person #8 as Yasuie’s execution exposes Wano’s cruelty as chaos spreads from the Flower Capital to Udon prison.
scene: Yasuie’s execution exposes Orochi’s cruelty and the tragedy of the SMILE victims in Ebisu Town.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Crochi's decision to make an example of this execution by broadcasting it

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wahahaha! Because the illustrations shogun is an utter fool!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see clearly the pain his subordinates are in!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look around you! At the beauty of the flower capital!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the work of generations of the Kozuki family

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the citizens of this land! They are our pride!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They do not belong to you, you fool!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These vast forests! The prairies! The rivers and the villages!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All you have done is sully them with the dirt of your greed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There's no taking back what you've said!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And now, I must Apolo- Gize to all of you for something!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This picture puzzle card, which has made quite the rounds of late...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Kozuki name has been dead for 20 years! It has no forces to carry out any sort of revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Thinking of the disgrace they've suffered,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Twenty years ago, after open died,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: us, the four remaining daimyo, a question.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will you serve the Kurozumi name, or will you fight us?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you, who was indebted beyond measure to open himself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You stole the throne with a cowardly plot!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Yasuie’s Execution and Udon Chaos storyline with 44 dialogue beats. Yasuie’s sacrifice and Big Mom’s arrival turn Wano’s hidden resistance into open chaos.
